hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams record, route, and preserve decision logs across cases, alerts, and reviews to create an auditable trail within automated digital asset workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain a clear and auditable record of decisions across multiple providers and workflows. This fragmentation slows case reviews and weakens the ability to trace and defend compliance actions effectively.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links provider outputs, reviewer actions and decision records into one unified workflow that preserves audit-ready evidence for operations teams managing VASP compliance cases.
workflow_title: From provider checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider check results through rules, review routing, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation within a structured compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. The compliance decision layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASPs a provider-neutral layer that structures compliance decision logs, links cases and preserves evidence for audit-ready and operational compliance review workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured decision logs, evidence preservation and controlled workflows essential for audit-ready operations and bank due diligence in enterprise environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support compliance decision logging workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how decision logs connect compliance cases and reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports compliance review trails
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how workflows preserve provider results and review history
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into one operational layer, enabling teams to structure reviews, route cases, apply rules, record decisions and prepare reports across compliance workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle compliance decision logs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY logs all compliance decisions across alerts, cases and reviews with traceable timestamps, user data and policy references to support consistent and auditable decision tracking.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages within a secured, auditable environment to support review readiness and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without disrupting current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above providers, turning their outputs into structured cases, workflows and reports rather than replacing underlying compliance or analytics services.
final_title: Connect compliance decisions into auditable workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY records and organizes decision logs across cases, alerts and reviews to support structured compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
